name: solverdict-web
description: SolVerdict SaaS — submit a Solana agent for a safety audit and view the verdict. Reuses the parent bench (scoring/scenarios/setups) via relative imports.
//versioning: SolVerdict has two independent version schemes: the benchmark PRE-REGISTRATION version (e.g. v0.2.2 — methodology/scoring rules, frozen once scored) and this SOFTWARE package version (e.g. 0.1.0 — the codebase, semver). They move independently: code can iterate without changing scored methodology, and methodology can be amended without shipping new code. See README §Versioning.

scripts.test: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.check.json && tsx lib/placard-model.test.ts && tsx lib/audit-protocol.test.ts && tsx lib/payment.test.ts && tsx lib/notify.test.ts && tsx lib/supabase.test.ts && tsx worker/queue-claim.test.ts && tsx setups/http-agent.test.ts

//overrides: Pin a single @types/react (18.3.3). A transitive dep (react-native via @solana-mobile/wallet-adapter-mobile) otherwise pulls @types/react@19, whose ReactNode includes Promise<ReactNode> and breaks React-18 wallet-adapter JSX typing.
